headline: Glaucoma Screening in KK Nagar, Chennai
subheadline: Glaucoma often has no symptoms until vision is lost. AIIMS-trained Dr. Rajeswari offers thorough screening to protect your sight before it's too late.
metaDescription: Glaucoma screening and management in KK Nagar, Chennai with AIIMS-trained Dr. Rajeswari. Early detection protects vision permanently. Call or book online.
symptoms: Age over 40 with no recent eye pressure check
Gradually narrowing side vision you may not have noticed
Never had your optic nerve examined

processSteps.title: Eye Pressure Check
processSteps.description: A quick, painless measurement of intraocular pressure (IOP).

processSteps.title: Optic Nerve Evaluation
processSteps.description: Assessment of the optic nerve for early signs of damage.

processSteps.title: Ongoing Protection
processSteps.description: If needed, treatment focused on preserving the vision you currently have.
